slots.blob1: bg-blob w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-primary top-[-10%] right-[-5%]
slots.blob2: bg-blob w-[400px] h-[400px] bg-sky-300 bottom-[-5%] left-[-5%]
slots.grid: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-16 items-center relative z-10
slots.badge: inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-teal-50 border border-teal-100 px-4 py-2 rounded-full
